items.html: *Understand well the reason for this Kli [vessel]: it is the discernment of the RIU [216] — that is, three times AB [72], from the SAG [63], MA [45], BON [52] of AB, meaning from the first Hey downward, all of which are the discernment of the Nukva [female] — the Gevurot and the females within the Hassadim themselves, by means of which she can receive the upper Hassadim, which are the male AB. And it is one name AB comprising all the five Gevurot, called RIU [216]; and the two of them together are called Ibur [conception]: AB plus RIU — to teach that there is no Ibur in the world except through the two of them.
